adPayloads.adSetRef: [AIW-DRAFT] Metis AI | Ad Set | TOF | Meta Ads Operators
adPayloads.primaryText: Starting a new campaign should not mean rebuilding the same strategy from scratch. Metis AI turns your brand context and campaign goal into a structured first draft for Meta Ads planning, so your team starts with something usable instead of a blank page. Join the waitlist for early access.
adPayloads.headline: Start with a better campaign draft
adPayloads.description: Early access for Meta Ads teams that want faster planning.

adPayloads.name: [AIW-DRAFT] Metis AI | Ad | MOF | Full Workflow Support

adPayloads.primaryText: Campaign planning, creative direction, and reporting handoffs all take time because teams keep rebuilding the same context. Metis AI helps turn that context into a structured first draft, so your next launch and your next recap both start faster. Join the waitlist to get first access.
adPayloads.headline: Draft faster across the full workflow
adPayloads.description: From campaign brief to reporting summary, all in one early-access tool.
